docker-logs-empty-storefront-medusa.description: Both labong-storefront and labong-medusa docker logs collected as 0 bytes. Returning after brief resolution at 15:17Z (run 3 had 7+118 lines). Containers appear to be running (nginx serves 200s), but docker log capture produces no output in the 2h window. May indicate docker logging driver misconfiguration or containers producing output only during deployments/restarts.

nginx-env-credential-scan.description: Systematic .env and .git/config credential scanner from 185.177.72.61 using l9explore/1.2.2. Continued in this run with ~50 new requests probing .env variants, .git/config, .aws/credentials, config.json across multiple path prefixes. All returned 404. Persistent automated scanner.

nginx-url-injection-probe.description: GET /?url=.env from 213.209.159.175 returned HTTP 200 (5340 bytes). Likely benign — Next.js ignores unknown query params and renders the homepage. Confirmed benign given consistent body size with other homepage responses.

ssh-brute-force-campaign.description: Sustained SSH brute force from 10+ IPs across multiple 2h windows. Current window includes: 45.148.10.157, 121.29.4.85, 45.148.10.141, 2.57.122.196, 162.55.94.103, 45.227.254.170, 2.57.122.188. Usernames: root, sammy, and others. All fail at preauth (public key only). Normal internet background noise.

nginx-new-credential-scanner-chrome131.description: Credential scanner from 13.251.77.166 (Chrome/131.0.0.0 Linux UA) making 170 requests. Probed: .env variants (25+), .git/config, phpinfo.php, server-status.php, server-info.php, POST to / (4x), /webroot/index.php/_environment. All returned 404 except GET / (200 2610b). Not seen in current window — may have moved on.

nginx-path-traversal-static-dir.description: 213.209.159.175 path traversal attempts via Next.js /static/ route: GET /static//root/.aws/credentials, GET /static//proc/1/environ, GET /static//home/user/.env, GET /static//.env, GET /static//app/.env. Targets cloud credentials and process environment. All returning 404. Not seen in current window.

storefront-ssr-missing-i18n-vision.description: FIXED 2026-04-13: Added vision.color.mintgrün and vision.room.home_office to all 12 locale files (commit 6201ff0). Keys missing in all locales after c9aba1f introduced dynamic i18n key lookup. Requires storefront redeploy to take effect.

docker-double-deploy-medusa-sigkill.description: FIXED 2026-04-13: start.sh now uses exec node_modules/.bin/medusa start (was: npx medusa start without exec — SIGTERM never reached Node.js). Added stop_grace_period: 30s to docker-compose. Commit 6201ff0. Requires medusa container rebuild to take effect.

labong-log-collection-total-failure.description: All 5 log sources returned FETCH_FAILED at 17:00Z. Resolved — collector successfully fetched nginx-access (1512 lines) and journald at 22:48Z. Was likely a transient SSH/network issue.

nginx-cgi-path-traversal-rce.description: CVE-2021-41773-style path traversal RCE attempts: POST /cgi-bin/.%2e/.%2e/.../bin/sh from 4 IPs (31.210.53.76, 119.3.230.28, 36.230.50.44, 140.245.121.61) + IoT wget injection from 129.211.7.73 (POST /cgi-bin/operator/servetest with wget payload targeting MIPS). All returned 400 — nginx not vulnerable. Background exploit scanning.
